ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number assigned by the vendor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., portno, rxpackets) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., Unsigned Integer, Unsigned Long Integer) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute was last updated */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., performance, configuration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_attributes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., network, security) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the configuration before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_permissions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device type */,
  "supported_attributes" TEXT /* JSON array of supported attributes for the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., scalar, variable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_nodes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alarm belongs to */,
  "alarm_name" TEXT /* Name of the alarm */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alarm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alarm is currently active */,
  "raised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who raised the alarm (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_raised_by FOREIGN KEY ("raised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarm_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alarm the history entry belongs to */,
  "raise_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was raised */,
  "clear_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was cleared */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alarm (if applicable) */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the alarm was resolved */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alarm in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarm_history_alarm_id FOREIGN KEY ("alarm_id") REFERENCES alarms ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarm_history_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read by the user */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
